seoTitle: How to Integrate Trello With Slack
metaDescription: Connect Trello to Slack so card updates stream into channels and you can spawn or update cards straight from Slack messages.
intro: Bouncing between Slack conversations and a separate Trello tab slows your team down. This guide covers linking the two platforms so activity notifications land in Slack automatically and you can manage cards without leaving chat.

steps.heading: Open the Slack app library
steps.body: In your workspace, open the app directory to search for available integrations.

steps.heading: Add the Slack integration module
steps.body: Search for Slack inside Trello's Power-Up folder and add the official module to link public or private channels.

steps.heading: Authorize the connection
steps.body: Approve the cross-platform cloud permissions needed to bridge your Slack workspace with your Atlassian container.

steps.heading: Send cards directly to channels
steps.body: Use the integration to send specific Trello cards into a Slack channel for visibility.

steps.heading: Set automated alert triggers
steps.body: Configure which card events, like moves or comments, should automatically post updates to Slack.

steps.heading: Use slash commands
steps.body: Try Trello's slash commands inside Slack to instantly spawn, assign, and update cards without switching apps.

faq.question: Can I manage Trello cards without opening the app?
faq.answer: Yes, once connected, you can use Trello slash commands inside Slack to create, assign, and update cards.

faq.question: Will every card update post to Slack?
faq.answer: No, you can configure which specific triggers, like card moves or comments, generate an alert.

faq.question: Do I need admin rights in both platforms?
faq.answer: You'll need permission to add apps in Slack and to add Power-Ups on your Trello board to complete the setup.

faq.question: Can I send an individual card to a channel manually?
faq.answer: Yes, the integration lets you send a specific card directly into a Slack channel for visibility.
